name: fleet-refresh-0-15-6
title: Roll out sd-ai-command-pack 0.15.6 to the fleet
description: Roll the tagged 0.15.6 pack release through all six known consumers in fast-canary priority order with install, audit, consumer checks, PR review, gated merge, and post-merge verification.
creator: sdelmas
notes: All six fleet consumers advanced from 0.15.5 to 0.15.6 through green, comment-clean PRs and passed the 134-target post-merge audit. Final fleet preflight reports six at-target consumers. AMC's repo-local cross-file Trellis hygiene hook has a non-blocking pre-commit --all-files batching follow-up.
